analysis.summary: The song explores the internalization of paranoia and self-sabotage, where a dark inner voice acts as a 'paper cut' that wounds the narrator from within while manipulating their perception of reality.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A shadowy figure with glowing red eyes peering through a cracked window at night, surrounded by flickering fluorescent lights and static noise.
Close up of a jagged paper cut on pale skin with bright red blood seeping into dark grime, sharp focus on the wound edges.
Analog television snowstorm blending with swirling dust particles and glitching digital artifacts in a dimly lit room.
A distorted, elongated silhouette stretching across a concrete floor, seemingly detaching from the wall to loom over the subject.
Sound waves visualized as jagged black tendrils wrapping around a human throat and ears, emitting sparks of electricity.
A cracked vanity mirror reflecting not the person's face but a menacing stranger with sharp teeth standing in their place.

styleHint: Modern rap-rock / nu-metal response track at 100 BPM, same mid-tempo bounce and nervous momentum as early-2000s rap-rock, but with modern industrial hip-hop production. Anxious male rap verses, explosive emotional male rock chorus, tense inner-voice whispers, call-and-response between singer and the voice inside his head. Heavy live drums, tight kick/snare groove, distorted guitar stabs, low tuned power chords, sub-bass pressure, aggressive turntable scratches, DJ cuts, vinyl backspins, chopped-and-screwed vocal fragments, glitch edits, pitch drops, tape stops, reverse cymbals, stuttered words, broken-radio effects. Dark paranoid atmosphere, cybernetic tension, paper-cut metaphor, voice mocking the singer, singer fighting back and remixing the voice. Big final chorus, chaotic scratches, no profanity.
